aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Michaels HVAC Pros due to the absence of structured data, lack of GBP visibility, and insufficient authority signals.
quick_wins: Create and optimize a Google Business Profile (GBP)

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: No GBP posts or Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for service processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and GBP visibility severely limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries in Queens, NY
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcasing certifications, licenses, and detailed service expertise to establish authority

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, Michaels HVAC Pros is missing out on 40% of potential leads from AI-driven searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The absence of a GBP and structured data means the business is invisible in AI-driven search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, GBP optimization, and authority-building content to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your business.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are capturing market share; immediate action is crucial to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business in Queens
opening_line: We analyzed your website and discovered critical gaps in AI visibility that are likely costing you valuable leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI-driven search and boost your lead generation.
